description: Phase 6 family-specific claim balancing rules (validation only, not production conversion).

DEATH_CLAIM.label: Death Claim
DEATH_CLAIM.balancing_formula: gross + interest - loan_principal - loan_interest - surrender_charge - withholding = payout
DEATH_CLAIM.settlement_chain_guidance: 0038 supports lifecycle and settlement linkage only; pair 0094 payout to 0530/0630 funding chain.
DEATH_CLAIM.confidence_notes: Clearing hub must not inflate net rollup. Withholding optional when codes absent.

SURRENDER_CLAIM.label: Surrender Claim
SURRENDER_CLAIM.balancing_formula: total_cash + partial_surrender - surrender_charge - loan_principal - loan_interest = disbursement
SURRENDER_CLAIM.settlement_chain_guidance: Loan offset-only chains may balance at zero until disbursement codes appear.
SURRENDER_CLAIM.confidence_notes: Disbursement codes optional for funded-only surrender events.

DISBURSEMENT_CLAIM.label: Disbursement Claim
DISBURSEMENT_CLAIM.settlement_chain_guidance: Treat as payment/disbursement event chain; do not require gross benefit reconstruction.
DISBURSEMENT_CLAIM.confidence_notes: Net payment equals payout total by profile design.
